subcodes.first_line: O thou who art oppressed in the path of God! Although the oppressors have inflicted injustice, and the ignorant have loosed their arrows and spears [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ستمدیده در سبیل الهی هر چند ستمکاران ستم نمودند و جاهلان سهم و سنان روا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
